results.sparql:
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX obo: <http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/>
PREFIX oboInOwl: <http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#>

SELECT ?definition WHERE {
  GRAPH <urn:doid> {
    obo:DOID_10652 oboInOwl:hasDbXref "MIM:10652"^^xsd:string .
    obo:DOID_10652 oboInOwl:hasExactSynonym ?synonym .
    obo:DOID_10652 oboInOwl:hasDbXref ?xref .
    ?disease a owl:Class ;
             rdfs:label ?label .
    FILTER (CONTAINS(LCASE(?label), "alzheimer disease"))
    ?disease oboInOwl:hasDbXref ?xref .
    ?disease oboInOwl:hasExactSynonym ?synonym .
    ?disease oboInOwl:hasDbXref "MIM:10652"^^xsd:string .
    ?disease oboInOwl:hasExactSynonym ?synonym .
    ?disease oboInOwl:hasDbXref ?xref .

results.question: Which subclasses of infectious disease in DOID have a definition?

definition.value: A disease by infectious agent that results_in infection, has_material_basis_in Bacteria.
A disease by infectious agent that results in infection, has_material_basis_in Viruses.
A disease by infectious agent that results_in infection, has_material_basis_in Fungi, which pass the resistance barriers of the human or animal body.
A disease by infectious agent that is carried out by a parasite which by definition is a pathogen that simultaneously injures and derives sustenance from its host.
A brain disease that is characterized by brain damage resulting from the abnormal folding, clumping and accumulation of cellular proteins in the brain induced by prion proteins.
